name: Symphony of the Unfettered Heart
description:
Your symphony lifts listeners from their worldly concerns. Attempt a Performance check to counteract an effect applying one of the following conditions to the target: , , , , , or . If you fail, you can't target the same effect on the target for 1 day. Use the condition's source to determine the counteract DC (for example, the DC for grabbed).

Heightened (9th) You can target up to four creatures.
